description: This file defines a React component for a quote detail page within a Next.js application. It includes static route generation logic, handles dynamic parameters, and renders different components based on the presence of a stock symbol.

methods.name: generateStaticParams
methods.description: Pre-generates static routes for a set of stock symbols to support static export of pages.

methods.name: QuoteDetailPage
methods.description: Main React component for rendering quote details; handles dynamic route parameters and conditional rendering.
